result:
1	---
     2	name: qjudge-exam-grading-sop
     3	description: Open-ended 題目 AI 批改 SOP(YAML)。
     4	---
     5	
     6	```yaml
     7	sop:
     8	  purpose: "Open-ended AI 批改:訂 rubric + seed grade.csv → 一題一題評 → 寫回。"
     9	
    10	  artifacts:
    11	    rubric.md:
    12	      writer: artifact_write
    13	      content_type: text/markdown
    14	
    15	    grade.csv:
    16	      seeder:   artifact_csv_from_json   # Stage 2 建檔
    17	      searcher: artifact_csv_search       # Stage 3/5 狀態檢查(不帶 rows)
    18	      loader:   artifact_csv_to_json      # Stage 3/5 取批次 payload
    19	      patcher:  artifact_csv_patch        # Stage 3/5 寫回部分變動
    20	      columns: [index, exam_answer_id, username, answer_text, original_score, original_feedback, score, reason, synced]
    21	      key_column: exam_answer_id
    22	
    23	  note: >
    24	    artifact 工具的 step 參數為 optional，正常流程省略即可；
    25	    工具會自動依 filename 定位唯一 artifact。僅在同 session 出現同名檔案時才需帶 step 消歧義。
    26	
    27	  stages:
    28	    - id: 1_target
    29	      out: context [contest_id, grading_question_id]
    30	      on_missing: 逐項問 user。
    31	
    32	    - id: 2_seed
    33	      steps:
    34	        - |
    35	          # 1. 產 rubric.md
    36	          artifact_write(
    37	            filename="rubric.md",
    38	            content=<markdown 評分標準>,
    39	            content_type="text/markdown",
    40	          )
    41	        - |
    42	          # 2. 抓答案
    43	          response = qjudge_grading(
    44	            action="list_answers",
    45	            contest_id=<X>, question_id=<Y>,
    46	            projection="grading",
    47	          )
    48	          # response 形狀: {"count": N, "items": [{exam_answer_id, username, answer_text, original_score, original_feedback}, ...]}
    49	        - |
    50	          # 3. seed grade.csv（records 帶 index + 5 欄，defaults 補 score/reason/synced = 9 欄）
    51	          artifact_csv_from_json(
    52	            filename="grade.csv",
    53	            records=response["items"],
    54	            defaults={"score": "", "reason": "", "synced": ""},
    55	          )
    56	        - |
    57	          # 4. 宣告批次計畫（每 20 筆一個 todo）
    58	          write_todos(todos=[
    59	            {"content": "批改 index 1-20 依 rubric.md",  "status": "pending"},
    60	            {"content": "批改 index 21-40 依 rubric.md", "status": "pending"},
    61	            ...
    62	          ])
    63	      out: [rubric.md, grade.csv (score/reason/synced 都空), todo list]
    64	
    65	    - id: 3_grade_batch_of_20
    66	      rules:
    67	        - 一題一題依 rubric.md 決定 score 與 reason，禁止寫腳本或機械批打。
    68	        - 禁止 artifact_read + offset/limit 手動找未評列；永遠用 artifact_csv_search / artifact_csv_to_json。
    69	        - reason 政策（省 output token）：
    70	            - 預設：滿分（rubric 最高分） → reason 留空；非滿分 → 必填 reason。
    71	            - 例外：滿分但有值得給的改進建議 → 可填。
    72	            - 覆寫：若 user 在 Stage 1 明說「每題都要寫 reason / 都要評語」 → 一律填。
    73	      loop:
    74	        - |
    75	          # 1. 看還剩幾筆沒評（便宜、不拉 rows）
    76	          status = artifact_csv_search(
    77	            filename="grade.csv",
    78	            where={"score": ""},
    79	          )
    80	          # status = {"matched": M, "total_rows": N}
    81	          # matched == 0 → 進 4_writeback_confirm
    82	        - |
    83	          # 2. 取本批 20 筆 + 必要兩欄（其他欄/列不載入，省 token）
    84	          batch = artifact_csv_to_json(
    85	            filename="grade.csv",
    86	            columns=["exam_answer_id", "answer_text"],
    87	            where={"score": ""},
    88	            limit=20,
    89	          )
    90	          # batch["records"] = [{exam_answer_id, answer_text}, ...]
    91	        - |
    92	          # 3. 對每一筆獨立思考後決定 score 與 reason（依 reason 政策）
    93	        - |
    94	          # 4. 寫回本批變動
    95	          artifact_csv_patch(
    96	            filename="grade.csv",
    97	            key_column="exam_answer_id",
    98	            updates=[
    99	              {"exam_answer_id": ..., "score": "...", "reason": "..."},
   100	              ... (本批 20 筆)
   101	            ],
   102	          )
   103	        - |
   104	          # 5. 更新 todo: 本批 completed，下一批 pending → in_progress
   105	          write_todos(todos=[...])
   106	        - status.matched > 0 → 下一輪；== 0 → 進 4_writeback_confirm
   107	
   108	    - id: 4_writeback_confirm
   109	      halt: true
   110	      precondition: |
   111	        artifact_csv_search(filename="grade.csv", where={"score": ""}) 回 matched == 0
   112	        （仍有空值 → 回 3_grade_batch_of_20 補完再進這裡）
   113	      branches:
   114	        contains_writeback_keyword: goto 5_writeback
   115	        other:                      ask_again (要「寫回」)
   116	      first_entry_message: |
   117	        全部 <N> 筆已評完（右側 panel 看 grade.csv）。
   118	        - 確認寫回 → 回「確認寫回」
   119	        - 取消 → 回「取消」
   120	
   121	    - id: 5_writeback
   122	      rules:
   123	        - 禁止手動解析 CSV 或寫 Python。search 看狀態 → to_json 組 payload → batch_grade → patch 標 synced。
   124	        - 每批最多 20 筆（跟 Stage 3 批次對齊）。
   125	        - 批次計畫前/每批完成後必 write_todos（跟 Stage 3 同規則）。
   126	      loop:
   127	        - |
   128	          # 1. 看還剩幾筆沒 sync
   129	          status = artifact_csv_search(
   130	            filename="grade.csv",
   131	            where={"synced": ""},
   132	          )
   133	          # matched == 0 → 跳出 loop 進 report
   134	        - |
   135	          # 2. 取這批 MCP payload（三欄）
   136	          batch = artifact_csv_to_json(
   137	            filename="grade.csv",
   138	            columns=["exam_answer_id", "score", "reason"],
   139	            where={"synced": ""},
   140	            limit=20,
   141	          )
   142	        - |
   143	          # 3. 整批寫回
   144	          qjudge_grading(action="batch_grade", grades=batch["records"])
   145	        - |
   146	          # 4. 成功的列標 synced="yes"；失敗的留空，等下輪重試或進 report
   147	          artifact_csv_patch(
   148	            filename="grade.csv",
   149	            key_column="exam_answer_id",
   150	            updates=[{"exam_answer_id": ..., "synced": "yes"}, ...],  # 只放成功的
   151	          )
   152	        - |
   153	          # 5. 更新 todo
   154	          write_todos(todos=[...])
   155	      report: 寫回 X 筆成功、Y 筆失敗（失敗列 exam_answer_id + 錯誤）。
   156	      idempotency: 同一 exam_answer_id 重複視為 no-op；synced=="yes" 的 row 下輪會自動被 where filter 跳過。
   157	
   158	  stage_resolution:
   159	    primary: artifact_list + artifact_csv_search
   160	    secondary: last_assistant_message
   161	    fallback: ask_user
   162	    map:
   163	      - {artifacts: [],                                    candidates: [1_target, 2_seed]}
   164	      - {artifacts: [rubric.md, grade.csv], score_empty>0: stage: 3_grade_batch_of_20}
   165	      - {artifacts: [rubric.md, grade.csv], score_empty=0: candidates: [4_writeback_confirm, 5_writeback]}
   166	
   167	  hard_rules:
   168	    - MCP 解析 / CSV 組裝必須在同一 turn 內自己做，禁 delegate task/subagent。
   169	    - 評分時一題一題思考並填 score，禁止寫腳本或機械批打。
   170	    - 任何批次操作「前」都要 write_todos 宣告批次計畫；「每批完成後」立刻 write_todos 把該批標 completed；todo 未更新 = 不可進下一批。
   171	    - 禁止用 artifact_read + offset/limit 找未評/未 sync 列；永遠用 artifact_csv_search（狀態）或 artifact_csv_to_json（取 rows）。
   172	    - 寫回前 user 訊息必須含「寫回」兩字。
   173	```

input_data.content:
# 批改準則

- 題目滿分：2 分
- 題意：解釋 Belady’s Anomaly，並指出有此現象的頁面置換演算法

## 參考答案重點
1. Belady’s Anomaly：頁框數增加，頁面缺失次數反而增加。
2. 發生於 FIFO 頁面置換演算法。

## 評分規則
- 2 分：
  - 正確說明 Belady’s Anomaly 的核心定義：增加 frame 反而可能增加 page faults；
  - 且正確指出 FIFO。
- 1 分：
  - 只答對其中一部分：
    - 正確說明現象，但未指出 FIFO；或
    - 指出 FIFO，但對現象描述不完整或不夠精確。
- 0 分：
  - 答非所問、完全錯誤、或無有效作答。

## 批改原則
- 以答案內容是否明確、完整為準；同義表述可接受。
- 只要明確提到「frame 數增加但 page fault 變多」即可視為現象正確。
- 若僅提到 LRU/OPT 不會有此現象，未回答 FIFO，仍屬部分得分或 0 分，視是否有明確指出正確演算法而定。

{"count": 20, "total_matched": 118, "records": [{"exam_answer_id": "2000", "answer_text": "他是反直覺的，增加 frames 卻沒有降低the number of page faults，反而變多了；approximately least recently used、mostly used recently"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2180", "answer_text": "Belady's Anomaly is the situation happens when FIFO policy is used. When we increase the number of frames, the number of page fault is increasing, which is not intuitive."}, {"exam_answer_id": "5884", "answer_text": "it's a counterinstinct 情形 that increase page frame would bring increase page faults."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2620", "answer_text": "belady's anomaly指的是載入的page越多，page fault越多。
該alogorithm會在page fault時替換掉距離上次access時間最久的page。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2378", "answer_text": "當可以用的frame更多時，page fault的次數也更多，FCFS algorithm會有belady's anomaly"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2664", "answer_text": "Belady's Anomaly是當給予更多frame空間時，frame switch卻更頻繁發生。
first in first out時會發生，最早加入frame 空間的frame會先被交換出去。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3372", "answer_text": "在增加頁框數目後，page fault 次數不減反增。
例如 FIFO 就有此種問題。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2542", "answer_text": "增加 number of page frames 導致 page fault 比例增加的情況。
"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2012", "answer_text": "當frame的數量增加 page fault也增加 ，FIFO容易發生"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2883", "answer_text": "a belady's anomaly means that more frames won't have fewer page fault.
FIFO"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3443", "answer_text": "when the numbers of frames increase ,the page fault rate was even higher
FCFS"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2464", "answer_text": "q1 : when page number increases, the page fault rate doesn't decrease but increase. This is the allocate frame number n is not the subset of allocate frame number n + 1.
q2 : FIFO"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2819", "answer_text": "Belay' s anomaly是一個很反常的現象，就是當physical frame增加而page fault不僅沒有相應的減少而是增加。此現象往往發生在FCFS replacement algorithm。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2117", "answer_text": "Belady's Anomaly is a scenario when giving a process more memory frames results in bigger amount of page faults. This anomaly may happen if FIFO replacement algorithm is used"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3105", "answer_text": "1. increase the pages but increase the page fault
2.FCFS"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2462", "answer_text": "In FIFO replacement algorithm, more pages are given, more page fault happen. This wired thing call Belady's Anomaly."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2070", "answer_text": "Belady's Anomaly is a counter-intuitive phenomenon where having more available slots to load pages in a page replacement algorithm actually leads to more page faults. Per example, the same sequence of page requests will lead to more page faults if you have 4 slots to load them than if you have 3. It happens in the FIFO algorithm."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2257", "answer_text": "Belady's anomaly is the curious behavior when allocating more frames to a process induces a increase a page fault.

The algorithm where the oldest page is replace by the new one, has this anomaly, "}, {"exam_answer_id": "6738", "answer_text": "形容 page 數量增加卻讓 page fault 的次數也增加的反直覺現象。FCFS 先到先服務的演算法可能會有此現象。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2104", "answer_text": "FIFO時，給他更多的frames會導致更多的page fault"}]}

"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3411", "answer_text": "Belady's Anomaly refers to a counter-intuitive situation that increasing number of page frames result in increasing number of page fault.
FCFS has this anomaly."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2507", "answer_text": "Belady's Anomaly is that when there are more frames can be allocated, it results in more page faults. FIFO has this anomaly."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2538", "answer_text": "Belady's Anomaly負責處理當page frame數量值增加時所造成的page faults。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2288", "answer_text": "Belady's Anomaly: More page frames may result in more page faults."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2329", "answer_text": "Belady's Anomaly is a phenomenon in virtual memory management where increase the number of page frames unspectedly causes the number of page fualts to increase instead of decrease.
PFF replacement has this anomaly."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4436", "answer_text": "belady's anomaly allows to properly replace the pages in order of its priority and its size order so the the system can be executed in a shorter time. The replacement algorithm that also has this is ESJ"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2702", "answer_text": "The Belady's Anonmaly means sometimes when we increase the page table size, page fault happens more frequently than before. The First Come First Serve has this anomaly."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4787", "answer_text": "If increase the frame, page fault rate may be increase.
FCFI(First come first in) "}, {"exam_answer_id": "2305", "answer_text": "Belady's Anomaly是指os分配給一個process的frame越多，反而讓他page fault的次數更高。
FIFO"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2255", "answer_text": "The page fault time increases when increasing the amount of the page frame.

FIFO will have this anomaly."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4161", "answer_text": "increasing the page number can be used but the page fault counts also increase
least used (choose the victom page which has the longest time from the last time being used)"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2480", "answer_text": "Sometime when we increase the number of page frame, but the page fault increase as well. That is an anomaly. And usually seen in the FIFO algorithm."}, {"exam_answer_id": "3231", "answer_text": "使用 First In First Out algorithm 時，增加 process 的 frames 數量可能會使 page fault 次數上升。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2175", "answer_text": "照理來說page提升時，page fault發生的次數也應該降低。但當使用FCFS的時候，在特定情況下可能會發生fage提升，但page fault次數也增加的情況。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2215", "answer_text": "提升frame數量卻導致page fault增多的反直覺現象，
例如在LRU時可能發生"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2337", "answer_text": "常發生在FIFO，是一個反常現象，給更多的page frames數量，page fault ratio不降反升。"}]}

ESTF"}, {"exam_answer_id": "1696", "answer_text": "frame數量增加但page fault不減反增"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2237", "answer_text": "增加page frames反而增加page fault，發生在FIFO中。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3483", "answer_text": "1. 更多個frame會有更多page fault
2. local replacement"}, {"exam_answer_id": "6506", "answer_text": "Belady's anomaly is a counterintuitive situation where increasing the number of page frame results in increasing the number of page fault.
